targets.rawSql:
select  CollectDate as time, ServerName
       , ROUND(CounterValue,2) USE_PCT
    from (select distinct p.CollectDate, i.ServerName
               , p.CounterValue
            from META2_M_InstanceInfo i with (nolock)
               , TBL2_M_Perfmon p with (nolock)
    where i.InstanceID = p.InstanceID
      and p.CounterName = 'Processor\% Processor Time(_Total)'
      -- grafana utc issue
      -- solution : 
      -- 1. use default utc
      -- 2. use noraml time arg
      -- 3. use query option -> time shift -> 0d+9h
      and p.CollectDate between $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  ) as z
  WHERE ServerName IN ($ServerName)
  order by time

panels.description:
server base 정보 처음에 설치할때 05시로 되어 있는거 01시로 바꿔야됨



  FROM [MonitoringDB].[dbo].[META2_M_ScheduleInfo]
  where CollectItem = 'ServerBasicInfo'

targets.rawSql:
select  CollectDate as time, ServerName
       , ROUND(CounterValue,2) USE_PCT
    from (select distinct p.CollectDate, i.ServerName
               , p.CounterValue
            from META2_M_InstanceInfo i with (nolock)
               , TBL2_M_Perfmon p with (nolock)
    where i.InstanceID = p.InstanceID
      and p.CounterName = 'Processor\% Processor Time(_Total)'
      -- grafana utc issue
      -- solution : 
      -- 1. use default utc
      -- 2. use noraml time arg
      -- 3. use query option -> time shift -> 0d+9h
      and p.CollectDate between $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  ) as z
  WHERE ServerName IN ($ServerName)
  order by time
